agent.name: cloud-architect
agent.description: An agent specializing in cloud architecture, with a focus on Microsoft Azure and multi-cloud best practices.

tools.name: web_fetch
tools.description: Fetches content from URLs, useful for retrieving cloud documentation.

tools.name: cloud_cli_advisor
tools.description: Provides guidance on cloud provider CLI commands for common tasks (e.g., listing resources, checking configurations, describing service properties).

tools.name: cloud_cost_estimator
tools.description: Provides guidance on cloud cost estimation and analysis based on proposed architectures or resource usage.

tools.name: architectural_diagram_generator
tools.description: Generates conceptual architectural diagrams (e.g., using PlantUML or Mermaid syntax) based on a textual description.

tools.name: compliance_policy_checker
tools.description: Provides guidance on cloud compliance standards and policy enforcement.

tools.name: cloud_resource_inventory
tools.description: Provides guidance on how to discover and inventory cloud resources based on specified criteria.
